mapper.select:
SELECT A.rqst_no , A.title , A.cont , A.rqst_id , A.ins_dt , A.views , A.depth , A.group_no , A.secret , A.board_type , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no) > 0 AS hasFile , (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no) AS totalFileSize , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no AND (parent_comment_id IS NULL OR parent_comment_id = 0)) AS commentCount FROM board A JOIN board B ON A.group_no = B.rqst_no WHERE 1=1
AND A.board_type = #{boardType}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY B.ins_dt DESC, A.order_no ASC, A.ins_dt ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board A JOIN board B ON A.group_no = B.rqst_no WHERE 1=1
AND A.board_type = #{boardType}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT A.rqst_no AS rqstNo , A.title AS title , A.cont AS cont , A.rqst_id AS rqstId , A.ins_dt AS insDt , A.upt_dt AS uptDt , A.views AS views , A.group_no AS groupNo , A.parent_no AS parentNo , A.depth AS depth , A.order_no AS orderNo , A.secret AS secret , A.password AS password , A.board_type AS boardType , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no) > 0 AS hasFile FROM board A WHERE A.rqst_no = #{rqstNo}
AND A.board_type = #{boardType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_table (board_no, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_size, file_path, ins_dt) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{orgFileNm}, #{storedFileNm}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId , board_no AS boardNo , org_file_nm AS orgFileNm , stored_file_nm AS storedFileNm , COALESCE(file_size, 0) AS fileSize , file_path AS filePath , ins_dt AS insDt FROM file_table WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT file_id AS fileId , board_no AS boardNo , org_file_nm AS orgFileNm , stored_file_nm AS storedFileNm , COALESCE(file_size, 0) AS fileSize , file_path AS filePath , ins_dt AS insDt FROM file_table WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}

SELECT comment_id, board_no, writer, content, ins_dt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id, secret, password, spoiler FROM comment WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND (parent_comment_id IS NULL OR parent_comment_id = 0) ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
SELECT comment_id, board_no, writer, content, ins_dt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id, secret, password, spoiler FROM comment WHERE parent_comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_no, writer, content, ins_dt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id, secret, password, spoiler) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{writer}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentCommentId}, COALESCE(#{secret}, 'N'), #{password}, COALESCE(#{spoiler}, 'N'))
